backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Scrambly backend, wiring together authorization, user approval, blob storage, and moderation features (ban/warn/friend requests, content filtering, profiles, appeals).
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that initializes empty sets for bannedUsers, warnedUsers, and moderatorUsers when upgrading the actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (Sonic speedrun videos, parental face scan, admin panel, etc.) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and recent changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Scrambly React app, setting the page title, Sonic Mania favicon, and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all app routes (home, search, videos, games, community, friends, settings, parental, admin, appeal, age-matcher, moderation) wrapped in AuthGate and Layout.
frontend/src/components/AccountLockedMes: Full-screen UI component shown when a user's account is locked, explaining the reason and providing a logout button to create a new account.
Settings toggle component that reads and updates the ad-blocker state via the useAdBlocker hook, displaying a shield icon and status label.
frontend/src/components/AgeVerificationM: Modal form that collects a user's name and birth year, calls the age verification mutation, and displays access-denied or error states based on the result.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Wraps the app to enforce authentication, profile setup, account-lock, and usage-timer-expiry states, rendering appropriate UI or the child content accordingly.
frontend/src/components/CameraCaptureSte: Onboarding step that activates the device camera, captures a photo for liveness verification, immediately discards it, and advances the flow on confirmation.
frontend/src/components/CommunityFeed.ts: Fetches and renders a list of community posts with author, timestamp, and message, showing skeletons while loading and empty/error states as needed.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostFor: Textarea form for submitting community posts with client-side banned-keyword filtering and server-side error handling, showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyCallBut: Pulsing SOS button that opens a confirmation dialog before initiating a tel:911 call via window.location.
frontend/src/components/ExternalSearchBu: Renders Google and DuckDuckGo search buttons for a given query, playing a Robotnik laugh sound and opening the external search URL in a new tab on click.
frontend/src/components/FriendListItem.t: Renders a single friend list item by fetching the friend's profile via their Principal, showing a skeleton loader while loading and displaying their name/initials with an online indicator.
frontend/src/components/FriendRequestIte: Displays a pending friend request with the requester's profile info and accept/decline buttons, using the useRespondToFriendRequest mutation to handle responses.
frontend/src/components/FriendsPanel.tsx: A slide-up panel (mobile) or modal (desktop) showing the user's friends list and pending friend requests, with a 1000-friend limit warning and skeleton loaders.
frontend/src/components/KidModeWrapper.t: A wrapper component that conditionally renders children based on whether the user's profile indicates kid mode (age ≤ 12), supporting hide-in-kid-mode and kid-only content variants.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout providing a sticky header with logo and desktop nav, a mobile bottom nav bar, and conditionally renders an admin link for the designated admin username and a moderator welcome banner.
frontend/src/components/ModeratorWelcome: Displays a dismissible top banner welcoming moderators, shown only when the current user is confirmed as a moderator and not yet dismissed in the session.
frontend/src/components/OnboardingFlow.t: Multi-step onboarding flow that sequences a camera capture step followed by an age verification modal, persisting camera completion state in sessionStorage to allow skipping on revisit.
frontend/src/components/ParentalFaceScan: A modal component that walks parents through a face scan verification flow (intro, countdown, capture, verify) using the device camera, then immediately discards the captured photo without storing it.
frontend/src/components/PINEntryModal.ts: A dialog modal for parental controls PIN entry and PIN change, storing the PIN in localStorage with a default of '1234' and validating input before granting access.
A full-screen overlay displayed when a user is banned from searching, showing ban details, an optional appeal button, and a logout option.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A controlled search input form with a clear button and submit handler that calls an onSearch callback with the trimmed query.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Renders a grid of search result cards for Sonic knowledge entries and YouTube channel entries, with loading skeletons, empty state, and type-specific icons and colors.
frontend/src/components/SearchWarningNot: A dismissible warning banner that displays the user's current search warning count, remaining warnings before a ban, and a visual pip indicator.
frontend/src/components/UsageTimerLockou: A full-screen lockout screen shown when a child's daily screen time limit is reached, prompting them to log out.
frontend/src/data/knucklesContent.ts: Static array of SonicKnowledgeEntry objects covering Knuckles-related characters, matchups, lore, and forms for use in search and display.
frontend/src/data/knucklesVideos.ts: Static array of Knuckles-themed video entries with YouTube IDs, titles, categories, and kid-safe flags.
frontend/src/data/sonicAbilities.ts: Defines a static SonicKnowledgeEntry for Amy's Piko Piko Hammer ability and exports an array of search alias strings for matching related queries.
frontend/src/data/sonicBoomVideos.ts: Defines a VideoEntry interface and exports an array of Sonic Boom episode video entries (Seasons 1+) with YouTube IDs, categories, and kid-friendly flags.
frontend/src/data/sonicCharacters.ts: Exports an array of SonicKnowledgeEntry objects describing major Sonic franchise characters (e.g., Sonic, Shadow, Tails, Eggman) with descriptions and highlights.
frontend/src/data/sonicExeVsMetalSonicVi: Exports a small array of VideoEntry objects representing YouTube videos comparing Sonic.EXE and Metal Sonic, all marked kid-friendly.
frontend/src/data/sonicItems.ts: Exports an array of SonicKnowledgeEntry objects for notable Sonic franchise items, currently containing the Chaos Emerald and Chili Dog.
frontend/src/data/sonicLore.ts: Defines a SonicLoreEntry interface and exports an array of lore entries covering major Sonic game storylines from 1991 onward, including key characters and notable events per game.
frontend/src/data/sonicPrimeVideos.ts: Defines a VideoEntry interface and exports an array of Sonic Prime episode video entries across three seasons, each with a placeholder YouTube ID and kid-friendly flag.
frontend/src/data/sonicSaysVideos.ts: Defines a VideoEntry interface and exports 15 kid-friendly 'Sonic Says' public service announcement video entries with placeholder YouTube IDs.
frontend/src/data/sonicVsMetalSonicVideo: Exports an array of VideoEntry objects for YouTube videos featuring Sonic vs. Metal Sonic battles and comparisons, all marked kid-friendly.
frontend/src/data/speedrunVideos.ts: Defines a list of Sonic speedrun YouTube video entries (id, title, category, kidFriendly) across four categories: Sonic 1, 2, 3, and Mania, along with exported category constants and types.
frontend/src/data/youtubeChannels.ts: Defines a single YouTube channel entry interface and exports a list containing one channel ('Teardropbfb') with its URL, description, and aliases.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdBlocker.ts: Custom hook that manages an ad-blocker toggle state persisted in localStorage, defaulting to enabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend actor calls including profile management, age verification, admin checks, warnings, usage time, and friends/ideas features.
frontend/src/hooks/useRobotnikLaugh.ts: Custom hook that synthesizes a Dr. Robotnik-style villain laugh using the Web Audio API with sawtooth oscillators, requiring no external audio assets.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchModerator.ts: Custom hook that moderates search queries against a list of inappropriate terms, tracking warnings and bans in localStorage, with special admin bypass behavior and a one-time appeal mechanism.
frontend/src/hooks/useUsageTimer.ts: Custom hook that counts down a user's remaining usage time (sourced from their profile) in real-time, exposing expiry state and a time formatter.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a Sonic-themed CSS custom property palette (light/dark) plus reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin-only panel (restricted to the username 'TailsTheBeast124') providing UI actions to ban, warn, unban, and promote users to moderator via canister query/mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/AgeMatcher.tsx: Page that displays the caller's profile and searches for other users born in the same year to facilitate age-matched friend discovery, currently gated as 'Coming Soon' for non-admins.
frontend/src/pages/AppealPage.tsx: Ban appeal submission page that validates origin, enforces a one-appeal-per-account limit, and calls processAppeal() to clear the ban and grant a life bonus on success.
frontend/src/pages/BlockBlastGame.tsx: Canvas-based Tetris-style block blast game with piece rotation, line clearing, score tracking, and a local-storage high score, rendered via a requestAnimationFrame draw loop.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Renders the community page with a post form and feed, showing a kid-mode block for users under 13 and displaying warnings/guidelines for eligible users.
frontend/src/pages/FriendsModePage.tsx: Handles the Friends Mode enrollment flow, allowing users to submit a birthdate for age verification, set a display name, and view friends/friend requests once approved.
frontend/src/pages/GamesPage.tsx: Displays a grid of available Sonic-themed mini games (Block Blast and Sonic Runner) with thumbnails and play links, plus a button to open an external games site.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main landing page with a hero section and navigation cards linking to Search, Videos, Games, Community, and Friends sections.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryMatchGame.tsx: Implements a card-flipping memory match game using Sonic-themed emoji pairs, tracking moves and elapsed time with a win state and restart option.
frontend/src/pages/ModerationDashboard.t: Admin-only dashboard for moderating community posts, issuing user warnings, reviewing Friends Mode age-verification requests, and managing submitted ideas.
frontend/src/pages/ParentalDashboard.tsx: A parental controls dashboard that requires face scan and PIN verification before granting access, allowing parents to configure usage timers, content restrictions, and change their PIN, with settings persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/RingCollectorGame.tsx: A canvas-based mini-game where the player moves left/right to collect falling rings while avoiding obstacles, tracking score and high score in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.tsx: A search page for Sonic-themed content that queries local knowledge entries and a backend, enforces parental time limits, moderates queries for inappropriate content, and renders video or knowledge results.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: A settings page where users can update their profile (name, birth year), set/verify a password, submit feature ideas, apply to become a moderator, and delete their account.
frontend/src/pages/SonicDodgeGame.tsx: A canvas-based dodge game where the player controls a Sonic character to avoid homing obstacles that spawn from all sides and increase in speed over time, with high score saved to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SonicJumpGame.tsx: A canvas-based platformer mini-game where the player controls a character jumping across procedurally generated platforms, tracking score and high score via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SonicRunnerGame.tsx: A canvas-based endless runner mini-game with obstacles, collectible rings, increasing speed, and a Sonic-inspired visual style, storing high scores in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SonicTriviaGame.tsx: A multiple-choice trivia quiz game with 22 Sonic the Hedgehog questions, tracking correct answers and displaying a final score at the end.
frontend/src/pages/SpinDashChallengeGame: A timing-based mini-game where the player holds and releases a button to land a charge meter within a randomized target zone across 8 rounds, with high score persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/VideosPage.tsx: A page displaying a filterable grid of embedded YouTube Sonic speedrun videos, organized by game category with color-coded filter buttons and kid-mode support.
frontend/src/pages/WhackAChaoGame.tsx: A 30-second Whack-a-Mole style mini-game featuring Chao characters on a 3x3 grid, with score tracking, countdown timer, and localStorage-persisted high score.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom Sonic-themed colors (sonic-blue, sonic-yellow, sonic-red), custom fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), extended border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for Scrambly, a Sonic-themed kids social/video app, documenting version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features including admin panel, parental controls, face scan, and video content updates.
